Features.Description: Query token set fed into dense / lexical / anchor / negative-cue scoring.
Item body tokens for dense and lexical scoring.
Tag tokens contributing to dense and anchor scoring.
Anchor tokens contributing to anchor and negative-cue scoring.
Target section token contributing to dense scoring.
Item kind contributing to dense scoring.
Source kind contributing to dense scoring.
Used by IsLifecycleRisk and IsBlockedByEligibility.
Used by IsLifecycleRisk and IsBlockedByEligibility.
Available for eligibility filters; not actively branched in V5.5 runner.
Eligibility filter requires sample target section equality at runtime.
post-scoring risk gate references mustNot list; current runner reads eval-side label, runtime needs query.mustNotItemIds policy.
Graph candidate overlap += 2 when item.Relations intersects sample.RequiredRelations.
Graph candidate overlap += 1 on evidence overlap.
Graph candidate overlap += 1 on source overlap.

Features.DerivationPath: (none — runtime must avoid leaking labels into candidate ranking)
Features.Description: Graph candidate overlap += 3 when item is in MustHitItemIds; this is eval-only and must be removed before runtime promotion.
Number of vector candidates retained.
Number of graph candidates retained.
Size of merged candidate window before TopK eval slice.

Notes: Filtering uses item.TargetSection × sample.ExpectedTargetSection (filter) (currently from RetrievalDatasetV2CorpusItem.TargetSection × RetrievalDatasetV2Sample.ExpectedTargetSection); runtime must supply router.targetSection or packageContext.targetSection

Filtering uses sample.MustNotHitItemIds (filter) (currently from RetrievalDatasetV2Sample.MustNotHitItemIds (eval ground truth)); runtime must supply query.mustNotItemIds from policy (runtime equivalent only)

CandidateExpansion uses item.Relations × sample.RequiredRelations (graph collection) (currently from RetrievalDatasetV2CorpusItem.Relations × RetrievalDatasetV2Sample.RequiredRelations); runtime must supply planner.requiredRelations or relationStore lookup

CandidateExpansion uses item.EvidenceRefs × sample.EvidenceRefs (graph collection) (currently from RetrievalDatasetV2CorpusItem.EvidenceRefs × RetrievalDatasetV2Sample.EvidenceRefs); runtime must supply query.evidenceAnchors

CandidateExpansion uses item.SourceRefs × sample.SourceRefs (graph collection) (currently from RetrievalDatasetV2CorpusItem.SourceRefs × RetrievalDatasetV2Sample.SourceRefs); runtime must supply query.sourceAnchors

CandidateExpansion uses sample.MustHitItemIds (graph collection) (currently from RetrievalDatasetV2Sample.MustHitItemIds (eval ground truth)); runtime must supply (none — runtime must avoid leaking labels into candidate ranking)
